schema.formLabel: What type of extension work are you planning?

next.formLabel: What stage of the project are you currently at?

options.formLabel: I am ready / almost ready for the work to start

next.formLabel: Describe the help you need with your extension project
next.helpText: Good descriptions attract good tradespeople. Give detail on the property purchase situation. Do you require an extension builder to accompany you on a house visit? Include the type of extension and sizes if known.
next.placeholder: E.g. We have bought a 1930’s semi we would like to get a single storey rear extension, knocking through existing kitchen & diner...

next.formLabel: Give your job a headline
next.helpText: More tradespeople express interest in jobs that have a descriptive name.
next.placeholder: E.g. Kitchen extension and fit-out

next.formLabel: Would you like to add any photos or plans?
next.helpText: Photos give tradespeople more context and details to understand the job and provide a more accurate quote.

next.formLabel: Postcode for the job
next.helpText: To find driveway installers near you we need to know where the job is.
